analysis.ambiguity1: "I need to filter the entire menu" is unclear. We don't know how the filter should work (whitelisting / blacklisting, sorting food descending or ascending by price, include only drinks / foods,...).
analysis.ambiguity2: "I need to be able to mark an item as Sold Out instantly" is vague. We don't know how fast the feature should be (200 miliseconds or 5 seconds or 10 minutes,...).
analysis.conflictSolution: Conflict between Cafeteria Manager: "I want students to order food on their phone while they are walking from class" and Chef: "I need to be able to mark an item as Sold Out instantly" because the students can still order ran out items before they mark them as Sold Out instantly. The solution is to delete all orders of the item when they are marked as Sold Out instantly, and send notifications to the students who ordered the ran out items.
analysis.nfr1: Reliability: Filtered menu must show no filtered items
analysis.nfr2: Reliability: system must still work offline for at least 10 minutes without crashing if the internet cuts out
analysis.nfr3: Performance: Push notfications must be sent to student at 11:30 AM
